description_long: This is a small, lifelike bird with a streamlined body and a subtle, naturalistic coloration. Its plumage is primarily brown with lighter and darker gradients along the wings and back, and faint markings on the sides. The beak is short, straight, and conical, well-suited for seed eating. The legs are not prominently visible but appear to be a muted, natural color, blending with the overall earthy tones. The tail is straight and moderately long, tapering to a slightly rounded tip. The bird's surface appears matte and slightly textured, resembling the soft, fine feathers of a real songbird.
description: A small, brown bird with a conical beak, subtle feather gradients, and a straight, slightly rounded tail. Its surface is matte and finely textured, resembling natural plumage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, conical beak, and subtle brown feather gradients.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow beak and the symmetrical shape of the head and body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the length of the tail and the smooth feather transitions.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the overall feather pattern, body width, and the straight alignment of the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: subtle gradients with faint mottling and solid brown areas
